title: A Cruel Distance
profile: You are corresponding with Aubrey Cornish, a bookmaker you met while abroad. After becoming instantly besotted, you had to leave after a month to return to your home country.
You are writing to explain your feelings and to persuade Aubrey to come to your country to live with you.

rulesOfCorrespondence.description: Aubrey is a bookmaker and therefore enjoys well-crafted missives. You will be using your best ink for this letter, giving you an extra Penmanship die.

consequences.text: You receive a response to your letter, explaining that Aubrey could never be with you. Your true love tells you to never write again.
Aubrey is flattered, but cannot return your love. You receive no more letters.
You receive a beautiful letter returning your feelings. Aubrey will be moving in the next month to be with you.
Aubrey is overjoyed with your letter and will not only move within the fortnight, but also wishes to marry you immediately.
